## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Trunk, GrowthX (Marcel Santilli), and a potential AI content generation partner (fwd.digital) to explore working together.](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital demonstrated their AI content workflow capabilities and shared examples of successful content ranking highly](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Concerns around maintaining technical accuracy and code snippet quality for Trunk's developer audience were discussed](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Two sample content pieces were proposed to evaluate fwd.digital's approach: 1) A straightforward topic, 2) A more technically complex topic around "flaky tests"](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Next steps are for fwd.digital to produce the two sample pieces for Trunk to evaluate quality](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's AI Content Approach

  - [Combines strategy and execution using custom AI workflows adapted to the client's needs](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Aims to rapidly generate quality content "seeds" at high volume to identify what resonates](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Incorporates human experts, client input, and continuous refinement to maintain quality](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Showed examples of high rankings achieved for technical content and glossary terms](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### Maintaining Technical Accuracy

  - [A key concern for Trunk is ensuring technical legitimacy and accuracy of any AI-generated content containing code snippets for their developer audience](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [fwd.digital acknowledged this challenge and proposed potential mitigations:](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
      - [Collaborating closely with Trunk's developer advocates](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [Fractionally hiring technical experts to review content](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [Leveraging Trunk's documentation as input for definitions/concepts](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

### Sample Content Pieces

  - [Straightforward topic: "How does a Roth Linter work?" (one of Trunk's top articles)](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Technically complex: Content on Trunk's upcoming "flaky tests" product, explaining what flaky tests are, why they matter, and issues at scale](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to produce the two proposed sample content pieces by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Review samples and determine if quality meets Trunk's bar](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [If satisfactory, schedule kickoff to onboard fwd.digital and provide context on Trunk](https://fathom.video/share/KqFkz9rzBECytCh3Rq8qi3PpvK7crTDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
